title: enneastemon schweinfurthii var. tisserantii
intro: Enneastemon schweinfurthii var. tisserantii is a plant species, also known as African black pepper tree, within the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Enneastemon schweinfurthii var. tisserantii include its use in treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
